summary.en-US: Sign in to your own Flow2API once, then sync the current browser profile or container Google Labs session with one click.
summary.zh-CN: 登录一次你自己的 Flow2API，之后一键同步当前浏览器 Profile / 容器里的 Google Labs 登录态。

description.en-US: Flow2API Token Updater is for users who run their own Flow2API service. During setup, the user enters a Flow2API site address plus their Flow2API username and password once. The extension uses that login only to obtain an internal plugin connection credential, does not keep the password for long-term use, then collapses setup and switches to a simple sync flow. After setup, opening the popup automatically checks and syncs the current browser profile or container's Google Labs session to the user's own Flow2API server, and the main button can trigger another manual sync immediately. Within one Firefox-based profile, the add-on keeps recent sync status and the last successful Labs session context scoped to the active cookie store or container so different signed-in accounts do not overwrite each other. In the AMO listed build, install-time host access is limited to https://labs.google/*; access to the user-entered Flow2API origin is requested at runtime only when the user connects a site. If a reusable browser login still exists but the related Google page is not open, the extension may silently open labs.google in a background tab to rediscover the session and then close the temporary tab. It supports Chromium browsers and Firefox-based browsers such as Firefox and Zen.
description.zh-CN: Flow2API Token Updater 面向部署自己 Flow2API 服务的用户。首次接入时，用户只需要填写一次 Flow2API 站点地址、用户名和密码。扩展只会用这次登录换取内部插件连接凭证，不会把密码作为长期运行凭证保存；登录完成后，设置区会自动折叠，界面回到极简的一键同步模式。后续用户每次打开弹窗时，扩展都会自动检查并同步当前浏览器 Profile / 容器里的 Google Labs 登录态到用户自己的 Flow2API 服务；主按钮也可以立刻再同步一次。在 Firefox / Zen 的同一个 Profile 内，扩展会按当前 cookie store / container 分别记住最近一次同步状态和最近一次成功使用的 Labs 会话上下文，避免不同账号互相覆盖。在 AMO 上架版中，安装时只声明 https://labs.google/* 的 host 权限；用户自己填写的 Flow2API 站点访问权限会在真正连接该站点时再运行时申请。如果浏览器里还保留可复用的 Google 登录态，但对应页面没有打开，扩展可能会在后台静默打开 labs.google 页面重新发现会话，并在完成后关闭临时标签页。它支持 Chromium 以及 Firefox / Zen 等 Firefox 系浏览器。

version.approval_notes: This extension accesses cookies for https://labs.google/ to read the __Secure-next-auth.session-token value. During setup, the user enters their own Flow2API address plus username and password. The extension sends that login only to the user's own Flow2API server in order to obtain an internal plugin connection credential for later syncs; the password is not kept as the long-term runtime credential. The AMO listed package does not request install-time access to all websites: its install-time host permission is limited to https://labs.google/*, and access to the user-entered Flow2API origin is requested at runtime through optional host permissions only when the user connects a site. After setup, the extracted Google Labs session token is sent only to the user's own Flow2API endpoint at /api/plugin/update-token. If a reusable browser login still exists but the related Google page is not open, the extension may silently open labs.google in a background tab to rediscover the session and then close the temporary tab. Before overwriting the user's existing Flow2API token, the extension attempts to validate the candidate Google Labs session through the user's own Flow2API endpoint and ignores stale Labs cookies that only look fresh because of an unreliable cookie expiration date; if a candidate session cannot be validated yet, the extension keeps the current token and retries later instead of overwriting it blindly. No analytics, advertising, telemetry, or third-party tracking endpoints are included. Local per-profile sync state, the last successful Labs session context used by that browser profile, and logs are stored in browser local storage. In Firefox-based browsers, recent sync state and the remembered Labs session context are further scoped to the active cookie store/container so different signed-in accounts inside one profile do not overwrite each other. Privacy policy: https://banana.rematrixed.com/privacy
